title: GuidancePlanRequest
description: Client request for a GuidancePlan. The client states which capability it wants, an optional budget ceiling, and how broadly it lets the server select seeds. The client never asks for a specific signal; seed_scope='auto' lets the private policy decide. additionalProperties is false.

budget.description: Optional client-requested ceilings. The server may cap these further.

max_items.description: Maximum number of seeds the client wants in the plan.

max_total_generations.description: Maximum number of artifacts the client intends to generate in total.
